```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-size:0.62em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:1.1em;">
  A skill is a <strong style="color:#5654A2;">folder</strong> holding a <strong style="color:#5654A2;">SKILL.md</strong>, summoned by name with a <strong style="color:#2C8475;">slash</strong>.
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.9em 1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.12);border-top:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.55em;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="folder" style="width:1.15em;height:1.15em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;line-height:1.2;">A directory</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.48em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.4em;">named after the skill</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.9em 1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.12);border-top:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.55em;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="file-text" style="width:1.15em;height:1.15em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;line-height:1.2;"><code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;">SKILL.md</code></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.48em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.4em;">a prompt loaded into context</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFBF3;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.9em 1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.16);border-top:3px solid #2C8475;border:1px solid #C8E6C9;">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#E8F5E9;border:1px solid #C8E6C9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.55em;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="terminal" style="width:1.15em;height:1.15em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1.2;"><code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;">/name</code></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.48em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.4em;">summons the workflow</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
